ideation: This sequence aims to capture the contemplative nature of the thinking face emoji. The animation uses a repeated motion of the left hand tapping the chin while the right arm remains at the side, conveying a sense of deep thought. Each frame emphasizes a distinct moment in the gesture. Frame 1 starts with both arms at rest, with the left arm slightly raised and angled to position the hand near the chin. Frame 2 shows the left hand lightly tapping the chin, with a subtle inward rotation of the wrist. Frame 3 retracts the left hand slightly, preparing for another tap. Frame 4 repeats the tapping motion, creating a rhythmic pattern. Frame 5 returns the left arm to its starting position, concluding the gesture.

frames.beat: arms rest, left hand poised near chin
left hand taps chin with a thoughtful twist
hand pulls back slightly, gathering thought
a rhythmic tap, the mind working deeply
arms return to rest, the thought complete
